zh.lifeSummary: 當Hwfa ab Iorwerth於大約1230年出生在英國威爾斯丹比爾萊薩姆時，他的父親Iorwerth ap Rhys414歲，母親Mrs. Iorwerth ap Rhys410歲。他於大約1261年與Efa ferch Llywelyn在英國威爾斯丹比爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世在英國威爾斯丹比爾，埋葬在威爾士丹比爾。

nameMeanings.name: Hwfa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: ab
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

nameMeanings.name: Iorwerth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from iōr‘ ‘lord’ + a mutated form of berth ‘handsome’; borne in the Mabinogi by the jealous brother of Madawg , son of Maredudd . Iorwerth came to be regarded as a Welsh equivalent of Edward , but it has no actual connection with that name.

variants.name: Yorath
meanings: Anglicized form of   Iorwerth   or, in some cases, a transferred use of the surname derived from it.

en.lifeSummary: When Hwfa ab Iorwerth was born about 1230, in Wrecsam, Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Iorwerth ap Rhys, was 414 and his mother, Mrs. Iorwerth ap Rhys, was 410. He married Efa ferch Llywelyn about 1261, in Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom, and was buried in Denbighshire, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hwfa ab Iorwerth est né environ 1230, à Wrecsam, Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Iorwerth ap Rhys, avait 414 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Iorwerth ap Rhys, avait 410 ans. Il a épousé Efa ferch Llywelyn environ 1261, à Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé à Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Denbighshire, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hwfa ab Iorwerth um 1230 in Wrecsam, Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Iorwerth ap Rhys 414 und seine Mutter Mrs. Iorwerth ap Rhys 410. Er hat um 1261 in Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom Efa ferch Llywelyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb in Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Denbighshire, Wales begraben.

Lui sposato Efa ferch Llywelyn circa 1261, nel Denbighshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel Denbighshire, Galles, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a Denbighshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Hwfa ab Iorwerthが約1230年にイギリスウェールズデンビグhシュアイアウレクサムで生まれた時，父Iorwerth ap Rhysは414歳，母Mrs. Iorwerth ap Rhysは410歳であった。約1261年にイギリスウェールズデンビグhシュアイアでEfa ferch Llywelynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼はイギリスウェールズデンビグhシュアイアで死去し，ウェールズデンビグhシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hwfa ab Iorwerth(이)가 대략 1230년 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르 렉샘에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Iorwerth ap Rhys(은)는 414세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Iorwerth ap Rhys(은)는 410세였다. 그는 대략 1261년 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르에서 Efa ferch Llywelyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르에서 사망했으며 웨일스 덴비그h실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hwfa ab Iorwerth nasceu aproximadamente 1230, em Wrecsam, Denbighshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Iorwerth ap Rhys, tinha 414 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Iorwerth ap Rhys, tinha 410 anos. Ele casou-se com Efa ferch Llywelyn aproximadamente 1261, em Denbighshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em Denbighshire, Gales, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Denbighshire, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hwfa ab Iorwerth родился около 1230 г. в местности рексэм, денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Iorwerth ap Rhys было 414 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Iorwerth ap Rhys, 410. Он женился на женщине по имени Efa ferch Llywelyn около 1261 г. в местности денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в местности денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности денбаишир, Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hwfa ab Iorwerth nació aproximadamente 1230, en Wrecsam, Denbighshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Iorwerth ap Rhys, tenía 414 años y su mamá, Mrs. Iorwerth ap Rhys, tenía 410 años. Se casó con Efa ferch Llywelyn aproximadamente 1261, en Denbighshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en Denbighshire, Gales, Reino Unido, y fue sepultado en Denbighshire, Gales.
